entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being studied for salinity tolerance.

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand high salt concentrations.

entities.name: SCREENING PROTOCOL
entities.description: A standardized procedure to identify salt-tolerant genotypes.

entities.name: NACL
entities.description: Sodium chloride treatment used to simulate salinity stress.

entities.name: GENOTYPIC VARIATION
entities.description: The differences in salinity tolerance among different groundnut genotypes.

entities.name: LEAF SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the leaves, which decrease under salinity stress.

entities.name: STEM/LEAF RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of stem to leaf biomass, which is affected by salinity.

entities.name: LEAF EXPANSION
entities.description: The process of leaf growth that is arrested by salinity.

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The process of converting light energy to chemical energy, limited by reduced leaf area.

relationships.description: used as a treatment to screen for
